name: cowork-mvp
description: Marketplace of installable skills for Bloomerang's internal AI platform. Each skill composes existing MCPs into one-command workflows employees use without thinking about it.

plugins.name: meeting-prep
plugins.description: Composes Google Calendar, Gmail, and Drive into a one-command meeting brief.

plugins.name: customer-snapshot
plugins.description: One-screen snapshot of a Bloomerang customer — account record, usage signals, recent touches, and a suggested next action. For CS and Support to run before any customer conversation.
